task_snapshot.title: Orchestrator release-gate automation design and dry-run integration
acceptance: Designs or implements orchestrator-only dry-run release-gate automation that aggregates queue status, audit results, validation matrix, and production evidence checklist into a single report.
Ensures dry-run mode does not mutate task-queue.json, task-locks.json, task-results.json, business code, production config, or target environments.
Documents how future approved execution can attach production evidence without committing secrets.
Keeps merge, push, deploy, production data operations, migration, seed, backup, restore, rollback, and Docker cleanup behind human confirmation.
Does not modify business code, migrations, seeds, auth, CI, Docker, deploy, infra, or production env files.
task_snapshot.blocked_reason: deferred while AGENT_PLATFORM_V2 P0 work is in progress
task_snapshot.resume_condition: Unblock only after AGENT-PLATFORM-V2-A5-EVENT-SOURCING-ARCH is completed/audited or the user explicitly resumes PROD-EVIDENCE-20260621-002.
